title: Spider silk armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Spider silk armor''' was a form of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] made from [[shell spider silk]]. It was capable not only of resisting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts, but actually deflecting them.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

[[Mahwi Lihnn]] was known to use this armor.<ref name="NEGWT" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
*''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' {{Ab|Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
